articles.author: Neil Irwin
articles.title: The Iran war is a new test of America's economic superpower - Axios
articles.description: The economy's scale, diversity and adaptability have allowed it to continue chugging along whenever crises arise.
articles.content: If you predicted the U.S. would fall into recession due to the latest headlines, the last few years have made you look dumb. Through interest rate increases, armed conflict in Europe and a trade war,… [+5013 chars]
